description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ${GITLAB_DEPENDENCY_PROXY}ruby image with a parallel matrix over RUBY_VERSION 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3. In a shared .base-ruby-job before_script it extracts the Bundler version from Gemfile.lock, installs that Bundler version, prints its version, sets deployment mode, and runs bundle install using all CPU cores. Add a specs job in the test stage that inherits the base, runs `if [[ "$RUBY_VERSION" != "3.1" ]]; then export SIMPLECOV=0; fi` then `bundle exec rspec`, and uploads coverage artifacts (coverage/index.html, coverage/assets/, coverage/coverage.xml as a Cobertura report) with a 31‑day expiry. Add a styles job in the test stage that also inherits the base and runs `bundle exec rubocop --debug --parallel`. The pipeline runs on merge requests, the default branch, and tags as defined by workflow rules and includes the SAST, secret‑detection, dependency‑scanning, semgrep, gem‑release, and danger‑review components.
